Sector capitulation breaks 52w low; AI substitution narrative deepens

value_picks.analyst_take: CTSH is the highest-conviction value setup in this set with all six framework criteria passing. Forward PE 8.99 against implied PE 13.5 leaves a clean 33% PE-rerating path on top of organic growth, while the 7.3% FCF yield and net cash balance sheet limit fundamental downside. Main risk is the AI substitution narrative for IT services — but the 50%+ upside to median target compensates for that overhang.

The AI tailwind thesis is real (Accenture AI bookings disclosure is the cleanest in the industry) — but it needs to convert into reaccelerating revenue or the multiple stays where it is.
